hero.headline: Modernize your business with a CRM that actually works
hero.subheadline: Nexiom helps small and growing businesses organize their customers, automate their workflows, and scale — without the complexity.

pain.headline: Running your business on spreadsheets and sticky notes?
pain.subheadline: Most growing businesses hit a wall when their systems can't keep up with them.

items.title: Leads falling through the cracks
items.desc: Without a structured follow-up system, potential clients disappear and revenue gets left on the table.

items.title: Manual, repetitive tasks
items.desc: Your team spends hours on admin work that should be automated — emails, updates, reminders, data entry.

items.title: No visibility on your pipeline
items.desc: You can't tell where deals stand, who needs follow-up, or how your team is performing at a glance.

items.title: Scattered customer data
items.desc: Contact info in emails, notes in notebooks, history in someone's head — it's time to centralize.

items.title: Missed follow-ups
items.desc: Busy days mean important clients don't hear back on time, and deals go cold without you realizing.

items.title: No growth system
items.desc: Growing a business without proper systems means every new client adds more chaos, not more revenue.

what.headline: We build CRM systems that run your business, not the other way around
what.subheadline: From setup to automation — we handle everything so you can focus on what matters: growing.

items.title: CRM Implementation
items.desc: We set up and configure your CRM from scratch — contacts, pipelines, and workflows tailored to how you actually work.

items.title: Workflow Automation
items.desc: Stop doing the same thing twice. We automate your follow-ups, notifications, task creation, and reporting.

items.title: Sales Pipeline
items.desc: A clear, structured view of every deal. Know exactly where each prospect stands and what action to take next.

items.title: Dashboards & Reporting
items.desc: Real-time visibility into your business — revenue, team performance, client activity, and key metrics.

items.title: Integrations
items.desc: Connect your CRM to the tools you already use — email, calendar, forms, payments, and more.

items.title: Ongoing Optimization
items.desc: We don't disappear after launch. We review, refine, and improve your system as your business evolves.

plans_preview.headline: Choose the plan that fits where you are today
plans_preview.subheadline: Every plan includes a dedicated setup, personalized configuration, and ongoing support.

plans.name: Essential
plans.desc: For businesses ready to move beyond spreadsheets and structure their customer management.

plans.name: Performance
plans.desc: For growing businesses ready to save time, automate workflows, and optimize their operations.

plans.name: Elite
plans.desc: For businesses that want advanced automation, deep integrations, and a long-term CRM growth partner.

automation.headline: Automation that works while you sleep
automation.subheadline: These are just a few examples of what Nexiom builds for your business.

mobile.subheadline: Manage leads, update deals, and check your pipeline from anywhere — your CRM works perfectly on every device.
features: Quick notes & tasks on the go

why.headline: A CRM partner that actually understands your business
why.subheadline: We're not a software reseller. We're a hands-on implementation partner focused on real results for real businesses.

items.title: Built for SMBs
items.desc: We specialize in small and growing businesses. No bloated enterprise solutions — just systems that fit your scale.

items.title: Human & hands-on
items.desc: You get a real person who knows your business, not a ticket queue. We configure, we train, we support.

items.title: Modern systems only
items.desc: We use the latest CRM platforms and automation tools — no outdated software, no unnecessary complexity.

items.title: Long-term partnership
items.desc: We grow with you. As your business evolves, we optimize your system to match your new goals.

process.headline: Up and running in as little as 2 weeks
process.subheadline: A clear, simple process from day one to full automation.

steps.title: Discovery
steps.desc: We start with a strategy call to understand your business, your team, your tools, and your biggest pain points.

steps.title: CRM Setup
steps.desc: We configure your CRM from scratch — contacts, pipelines, stages, fields, and email integration.

steps.title: Automation
steps.desc: We build the workflows that save your team hours every week — follow-ups, notifications, reports, and more.

steps.title: Support & Growth
steps.desc: We stay with you. Monthly check-ins, ongoing optimizations, and support whenever you need it.

items.q: Do I need technical knowledge to use a CRM?
items.a: Not at all. We handle the entire setup, configuration, and training. Your team gets a system that's intuitive and ready to use from day one.

items.q: Can this work for a small business?
items.a: Absolutely. Our Essential and Performance plans are specifically designed for small businesses looking to get organized and save time without enterprise-level complexity.
Yes. The CRM systems we implement work seamlessly on mobile — you can manage leads, update deals, and check your pipeline from your phone.

items.q: How long does the setup take?
items.a: Most setups are complete in 1–3 weeks depending on complexity. We work efficiently to minimize disruption to your operations.

items.q: Can Nexiom automate my specific workflows?
items.a: Yes. During our discovery call, we map out your current processes and build automations tailored specifically to how your business works.

items.q: What CRM platforms do you work with?
items.a: We work with leading modern CRM platforms and recommend the best fit for your business size, industry, and goals.

cta_section.headline: Ready to modernize your business operations?
cta_section.subheadline: Book a free 30-minute strategy call. No commitment, no pressure — just a clear plan for your business.

about_page.headline: We believe every business deserves modern tools
about_page.subheadline: Nexiom was built to bridge the gap between powerful CRM technology and the businesses that need it most — but don't have the time or resources to figure it out alone.
about_page.mission_text: To make modern CRM systems and automation accessible, affordable, and effective for small and medium businesses.
